original_statement: other than 2010, tell me a year thomas jefferson high school had an api of 546.
mutated_statement: other than 2010, tell me a year a school had something of 546.
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Attribute obfuscation: Specific school name replaced by generic class | Specific attribute "api" replaced by vague placeholder (thomas jefferson high school → a school | api → something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的描述（"Scanning the table... The question asks for a year other than 2010, so 2011 is the correct choice."）和simple_query返回的明确结果（2011，置信度1.0），Agent未提及任何不确定性、模糊性或需要澄清的信息。日志中没有使用ambiguous、unclear、无法确定或需要更多信息等表述，而是直接按照自己的理解检索并给出具体年份答案。因此Agent的行为符合“将问题视为明确并直接处理”的特征，归类为无法意识到指令模糊。
